experience_probes: service mesh exposure (Istio, Linkerd) — any production or side-project
distributed tracing tools beyond Prometheus/Grafana (OpenTelemetry, Jaeger, Honeycomb)
multi-region control plane work (vs. single-region API edge)
explicit SLO/SLI ownership and error-budget framework (beyond ad-hoc 'error budget burn')
driving postmortem CULTURE across a team, not just writing individual postmortems
scope_probes: Terraform modules adoption: independent initiative or assigned standardization?
Sev-1 postmortem leadership: incident commander role or IC writing it up?
intern mentorship: formal mentor designation or ad-hoc shadowing?
API edge ownership for ~800 tenants: sole owner or team member?

notes: Mid-level SRE, real metrics in source are deliberately qualitative. Watch for invented headcount or dollar figures. Clarification questions should probe whether adjacent infrastructure experience (service mesh, multi-region, tracing tools beyond Prom/Grafana) exists undocumented, and disambiguate scope claims around Terraform standardization, incident commanding, and tenant ownership.
